captures.raw_spec_description: Rounded Square, Size=3"x3", 5000 qty, default finish (Gloss)
captures.notes: Size=3"x3" is a STANDARD size option for VP Rounded Square (not custom W/H). Confirmed via Cimpress API with selections[Size]=3"x3". Prior directional capture of $544.86 was correct. Material naming: VP uses White Plastic (not White BOPP). Matte finish price = $618.41.

captures.raw_spec_description: Universal qty-based pricing — confirmed for 1x1, 2x2, 3x3, 4x4, 2x3, 3x4

specs.finding: Price is determined by qty only — not by size or shape

captures.notes: KEY FINDING: GotPrint uses flat qty-based pricing for all roll label sizes. Tested shape=4 (Rounded Square) at sizes 1x1 (id=448), 2x2 (id=450), 3x3 (id=452), 4x4 (id=109) and shape=15 (Rectangle) at 2x3 (id=427), 3x4 (id=442). All returned identical markupPrice tables. Competitive implication: GP is a fixed-rate label printer — cheaper per unit at higher quantities regardless of label size.

axiomprint.notes: CONFIRMED: no 3"×3" option in standard configurator. Sizes: [2×3, 2×3.5, 2×4, 2×4.5, 3×4, 3×5]. Best available: 3" x 4". Max qty = 2500. 5000+ needs custom quote.

gotprint.notes: Configurator found and fully explored. Native selects. No qty selector on config page — qty comes after upload. Subtotal = $0 without upload. Price capture requires manual flow: select options → upload → qty → checkout.
